name: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.66 km from property

contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh

address.address1: Jl. Pati, Keuaramat, Kec. Kuta Alam

nearbyPlaces.name: Ikatan Dokter Indonesia Cabang Banda Aceh

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Physical distancing of at least 1 meter

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Saya tinggal 1 malam disini, dan ini adalah hotel dengan harga terbaik, lokasinya juga dekat dengan kota, dan ada banyak toko makanan radius 100m.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives: so many mosquitoes in the area. even there were some in my room. hopefully the hotel provides insect repellant fot the guests
comments.reviewPositives: Location is good and worth the price

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Never stayed anywhere else besides my own lodging, and this is a worthwhile experience. The room looks like the property photo. Nice.
comments.originalComment: Belum pernah menginap selain rukajs sndiri, dan ini pengalaman yg layak. Ruangan seperti di foto properti. Bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives: pas dévier dans la salle de bain
comments.reviewPositives: Très basique mais très bien pour une nuit ou deux. confortable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Highly recommended for those who want to travel and stay in the city at an affordable price. Additionally, the accommodation also has a water heater in each room. If you want to eat, just walk 5 steps ahead and you can eat at Bukulah.
comments.originalComment: Sangat recomended untuk yg mau bepergian terus nginap di daerah kota dgn harga yg affordable. Ditambah penginapannya juga tersedia water heater di setiap kamarnya. Kalo mau makan tinggal jalan 5 laingkah ke depan udah bisa makan di bukulah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives:
Ein neuer Anstrich würde das Zimmer etwas behaglicher machen. 
Das Bett war eine Zumutung. Nicht weil es unbequem, sondern weil es einfach schmutzig war. 
Das nächste mal buche ich besseren Standard. Bin mir nicht sicher, ob die guten Bewertungen hier wirklich gerechtfertigt sind...
comments.reviewPositives:
Die Inhaber waren sehr freundlich und haben mir angeboten mich zum Fährhafen zu fahren. 
Die Unterkunft war nur als Zwischenstation gedacht.
AC hat gut funktioniert 👍🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: It's suitable for that price, quite clean, but there are some stains on the sheets. The plus side is that there is a water heater. 👍
comments.originalComment: Cocok sih untuk harga segitu, lumayan bersih, cuma di sepreinya ada beberapa noda. Tp plusnya ada water heaternya👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The room was clean, the facilities were quite complete, but I happened to get a room where the air conditioning was not cool enough. Recommended.
comments.originalComment: Kamar bersih, fasilitasnya lumanyan lengkap, tapi kebetulannya dapat kamar yang AC nya kurang dingin. Rekomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: We stay in period of natal and new year holiday, which is maybe more visitor to stay. The staff was not stand by in recepcionist, so when we have to wait about 30-45 minutes until the staff coming and check in. The parking management is also bad, there is no rule / guidance how to enter / exit when the parking lot is full of car
comments.reviewTitle: The staff is not stand by and bad parking management

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Dirty room, dirty bathroom, sheets with many stains and a smell that seems to not have been changed. Then upon arrival, there was no receptionist, so we had to call first and they were not friendly.

If there are other hotel options, it's better to go to another hotel, friends.
comments.originalComment:
Kamar kotor, kamar mandi kotor, seprei banyak bercak dan bau tampaknya tidak di ganti. Lalu saat datang tidak ada resepsionis sehingga harus di telpon dahulu dan tidak ramah.

Jika ada pilihan hotel lain mending ke hotel lain yaa teman teman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Ngga mewah, tapi nyaman. Cari makan juga dekat, ada parkiran.
Staf ramah.  Worth it

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The room is spacious and clean, the AC is cool. The facilities are okay. The staff is also friendly. Recommended.
comments.originalComment: Kamarnya luas dan bersih, AC nya dingin. Fasilitas ok. Staf juga ramah. Rekomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives:
No sink, no soap, no body wash.

Rat faeces all over the bathroom

Mouldy bathroom 

Stained and burnt bed sheets

No receptionist and no English spoken. 

Lumpy pillows

Inefficient AC

Lazy staff.
